name: reversal-streetwear
description: REVERSAL - A premium, high-end MERN stack e-commerce web application featuring a stunning minimalist streetwear & combat-culture aesthetic, robust JWT authentication, real-time order history, interactive admin dashboards, dynamic promotional banners, and full-featured checkout.

scripts.install-all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.build: npm run install-all && npm run build-client
